For Employers

Meet Your AI Application Assistant: A Smarter Way to Apply for Jobs

Written by Built In Staff
Published on Jun. 05, 2025
AI Application Assistant

Applying for jobs can be exhausting. From scanning listings to rewriting the same answers across applications, it’s easy to lose momentum. That’s why Built In created the AI Application Assistant — a smart AI tool that helps you apply faster with less friction by learning from your previous submissions and tailoring suggestions to each role. Unlike other tools that offer generic support, the assistant uses your past data to complete your application process end-to-end.

What Is the AI Application Assistant?

The AI Application Assistant is a built-in experience that helps you auto-complete Easy Apply job applications directly on Built In. It lives inside the job application page on all Easy Apply jobs and activates when you enable "Career Memory" on the Easy Apply application page.

How It Works

Once you activate "Career Memory", you’ll see the AI Application Assistant in action when you apply for any Easy Apply job.

  1. Start your application: On Easy Apply jobs, click “Easy Apply” and the assistant will automatically fill out any answers on the form you have previously answered.

  2. Review suggested answers: Double-check the accuracy of your answers.

  3. Submit confidently: The assistant ensures you’ve filled all required fields and highlights anything you may want to revise before clicking submit.

Powered by Career Memory

The AI Assistant is powered by your Career Memory — a secure, private collection of past answers you submitted on Built In.

This means the more you use Built In, the more helpful the assistant becomes. It doesn’t just guess — it knows what you have submitted previously.

And don’t worry: You can always review, edit, or delete any stored answers from your settings.

Try It Yourself

Ready to see it in action? Find an Easy Apply job on Built In and enable Career Memory on the application form, then let the AI Application Assistant guide you through a smarter, faster application — and finally take some friction out of the job hunt.
